models.title: Heart and Major Vessels
models.purpose: External heart orientation, chambers, valves, coronary vessels, aortic arch, pulmonary vessels, and superior vena cava.

source.title: 3D Reference Organ Set for Male, v1.10
source.creator: Kristen Browne; Heidi Schlehlein

modifications: Extracted heart, coronary, pulmonary, aortic arch, and superior vena cava subtrees from the aligned HRA united-male source.
Simplified to 60 percent target geometry with a 0.5 percent error ceiling.
Quantized and optimized with gltfpack 1.2 while preserving anatomical mesh names.
knownGaps: The long inferior vena cava and neck branches were omitted to keep the heart large and useful in the initial view.
Use hide/isolate controls to expose internal chambers and valves.

models.title: Brain
models.purpose: Whole-brain orientation and selection of cortical gyri, deep nuclei, ventricles, brainstem, cerebellum, hippocampus, optic structures, and white-matter structures.

source.title: 3D Reference Organ for Brain, Male v1.3
source.creator: Kristen Browne; Heidi Schlehlein

modifications: No geometry modification; the official NIH 3D input GLB is packaged unchanged.
knownGaps: Deep structures are occluded in the whole-brain view and require hide/isolate controls.
This is an anatomical reference model, not a replica of the classroom plastic brain model.

models.title: Torso Systems
models.purpose: Spatial relationships among thoracic, abdominal, urinary, digestive, vascular, lymphatic, vertebral, and pelvic structures.

source.title: 3D Reference Organ Set for Male, v1.10
source.creator: Kristen Browne; Heidi Schlehlein

includedSystems: lungs, trachea, main bronchi, and lobar bronchi
liver, gallbladder, biliary tree, pancreas, small intestine, and large intestine
kidneys, renal pelvises, ureters, urinary bladder, and renal vessels
modifications: Extracted 29 exam-relevant anatomical subtrees from the aligned 242 MB HRA united-male source.
Simplified to a 40 percent target with a 0.75 percent error ceiling.
Quantized and optimized with gltfpack 1.2 while preserving 282 selectable anatomical mesh names.
knownGaps: The HRA source does not include the stomach, esophagus, diaphragm, ribs, sternum, or a classroom-model body shell in this set.
Use the real classroom photos as the authority for exact model appearance, removable pieces, numbering, and the omitted structures.
This model is for 3D relationships and identification practice, not a literal digital twin of the lab torso.
